## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (under `[Unreleased]`)
- [ ] Updated docs / README if behavior changed
